Years of art
My story

Hi, I'm Harini 👋
Your Nail Artist

Based in Thiruverkadu, Chennai, I'm a passionate freelance nail artist who believes every hand deserves to be a canvas. From minimal elegance to bold statements — I bring your vision to life.

Whether it's daily wear, a bridal masterpiece, or something totally unique — I'm here to make it happen!

Gel Extensions3D Nail ArtBridal Sets Ombre NailsChrome PowderHome Visits Press-On SetsRhinestones
📍 Thiruverkadu, Chennai
What I offer

Nail Services

💅
Gel Extensions
Long-lasting gel nails in any shape — square, almond, coffin, or stiletto. Built to perfection.
Starting ₹800
🎨
Custom Nail Art
Freehand designs, florals, geometric art, and any design you dream of — made just for you.
Starting ₹600
✨
Ombre & Glitter
Gorgeous gradient fades, full glitter, chrome powder and holographics. Total sparkle moment.
Starting ₹500
💍
Bridal Nail Set
Special bridal packages with rhinestones, gold foil, 3D art and intricate designs for your big day.
Starting ₹1,500
🌸
Press-On Nails
Custom press-on sets made to your shape, length and design — take them home!
Starting ₹400
🔧
Repair & Fill
Gentle repairs, regrowth fills, and safe gel removal without damaging your natural nails.
Starting ₹200

Professional quality

Premium Tools & Products

Every nail set is created using top-quality gel polishes, professional brushes, rhinestones, and precision nail art tools — ensuring a perfect finish that lasts for weeks.

Hygiene is my top priority. All tools are properly sanitized and single-use items are used where needed for your safety.

50+
Art styles
20+
Color shades
100%
Sanitized
Special occasion

Bridal Nail Sets

Your wedding day deserves perfection. I create stunning bridal nail art that complements your mehndi, outfit, and personality. Every detail crafted with love.

Custom designs based on your bridal look
Rhinestones, gold foil & 3D art included
Long-lasting gel that survives your big day
Available for home visits across Chennai
Bridal party discounts available
